item.title: Novo Nordisk & OpenAI AI Partnership
item.description:
• Summary: Novo Nordisk has partnered with OpenAI to integrate artificial intelligence across its research and development, manufacturing, and corporate functions. This move is part of a broader industry trend towards AI adoption in biopharma.
  • MoAs: N/A
  • Sources: BioPharma Dive, Fierce Pharma, STAT News

item.title: FDA Clinical Trial Transparency Push
item.description:
• Summary: The FDA is ramping up its push for clinical trial transparency, asking over 2,200 drug developers to make trial results public. This initiative aims to increase data availability and improve research integrity.
  • MoAs: N/A
  • Sources: STAT News, BioSpace, STAT News

item.title: FDA Regulatory & Safety Guidance
item.description:
• Summary: The FDA has bolstered its framework for bespoke therapies with new draft safety guidelines, while also rebuking Pfizer for misleading advertisements for Adcetris (brentuximab vedotin) on Facebook.
  • MoAs: Adcetris (brentuximab vedotin): anti-CD30 monoclonal antibody conjugated to monomethyl auristatin E (MMAE), a microtubule disruptor.
  • Sources: BioSpace, Fierce Pharma

item.title: Maryland Drug Price Cap
item.description:
• Summary: Maryland's drug affordability board has implemented its first price cap on a diabetes medicine, marking a state-level policy shift to control prescription drug costs and improve access.
  • MoAs: N/A
  • Sources: STAT News
